Notes: Always preserve Exact primary key.
Link to parent subscription → sale.order. Resolve via x_aa_exact_id on sale.order.
Line ordering. Odoo uses 'sequence' for display order.
Line description → Odoo 'name' (Description field on order line).
Exact Item → Odoo product. Resolve: Item GUID → product.template (via x_aa_exact_id) → product_variant_id → product.product. See Items sheet.
Denormalized display field. Value derivable from Item → product.product.name.
Direct mapping.
Unit price → Odoo price_unit. Note: Exact says 'price * unit factor' — verify whether this is the raw price or already factored.
Net price in transaction currency. Odoo computes price_subtotal. Store for reconciliation.
Discount percentage. Direct mapping. Verify Exact uses percentage (0-100) same as Odoo.
Amount in default (company) currency. Useful for reconciliation.
Amount in foreign (transaction) currency. Store for reconciliation.
Line-level start date. Odoo subscription lines do not have per-line start/end dates.
Line-level end date.
Exact line type integer code. No clean Odoo equivalent. Stored as-is; description denormalized alongside.
Denormalized from SubscriptionLineTypes table. Stored alongside x_aa_line_type so the code is human-readable.
Exact cost center. Odoo uses analytic accounts (different paradigm). Custom for safety.
Exact cost unit. Same rationale as Costcenter.
Unit of measure code → Odoo UoM. Requires code → uom.uom lookup.
Denormalized display field. Value derivable from UnitCode → uom.uom.name.
VAT code → Odoo tax. Requires tax code mapping from Exact → Odoo account.tax.
Denormalized display field. Value derivable from VATCode → account.tax.name.
VAT amount in transaction currency. Odoo computes tax amounts. Store for reconciliation.
Division → Company mapping.
Redundant with parent subscription number. Derivable from order_id → sale.order.x_aa_subscription_number.
Additional line notes. Odoo has no per-line notes field separate from 'name'.
Exact Premium-only custom field endpoint. Not a data field — skip.
Auto-resolved by Odoo from product_id. No migration action needed.
